summary.shape_sentence: Early flush and immediate reversal turned into a persistent trend-up day with midday stair-step continuation, a late pullback, and a close still near the upper end.

goat.note: Opening reversal from the session low into the first strong breakout leg.

red_circles.behavior: Mostly marked pullback crests and late-session failure points; early bearish signals were absorbed, later ones near highs had more effect.

green_circles.behavior: Clustered on reclaim points and pullback holds, reinforcing the bullish stair-step structure.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Lower supply near 25150-25180 was broken; upper supply around 25330-25395 was reached and partially respected into the late fade.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand began near 24980-25050 and stepped higher through the day; pullbacks repeatedly held these zones.

time_markers.10am_blue: Strong reversal/breakout phase; price was lifting from the open flush and expanding higher.
time_markers.12pm_red: Bullish rotation above support; lunch trade stayed constructive rather than failing.
time_markers.2pm_green: Price was at or near peak extension in upper supply after the afternoon push.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed after a late fade from highs but still well above the open and nearer HOD than LOD.

takeaway: Bullish reversal-to-trend day: early RTH flush was rejected, demand kept stepping up, and the session trended higher into early afternoon before a modest late fade under upper supply.
